query:
select
                f.id,
                f.title,
                f.feed_url,
                f.site_url,
                f.created_at,
                f.last_synced_at,
                count(e.id) as "entry_count!",
                count(e.id) filter (where e.read_at is null) as "unread_entry_count!",
                exists (
                    select 1
                    from feeds_icons fi
                    where fi.feed_id = f.id
                ) as "has_icon!"
            from feeds f
            left join entries e on e.feed_id = f.id
            where f.id = $1
            group by f.id
            order by f.created_at desc
